channel.title: VSCode on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in VSCode on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to install VS Code - Visual Studio Code on Android phone.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-e-TEghAqT64/YpT0wZZ0mGI/AAAAAAAALeI/RgFIQ1vXvM40UEsE6--ilZqx_YRHxOVKgCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1653929149880615-0.png" alt=""> When smartphones didn’t existed computers are the only devices that are available to people since decades even now computers usually have more powerful hardware and software then smartphones including that computers have millions of softwares that are more capable and advanced then smartphones. Now a days, majority of people switched to smartphones as you can do almost all works of PC on smartphones in its own way but there are some functions and softwares of computers that are not available on smartphones like for instance you can directly install computer softwares on smartphone mobile operating systems due to different hardware and software limitations.
